createCharge wraps client call in try/catch (OnChainOSException $e) and returns status=failed with error=$e->getMessage(). Test at line 82 asserts return value and 'transport boom' in error.
Service checks !isset($response['session_id']) || !isset($response['status']) and returns status=failed with error='malformed response'. Test at line 99 confirms.
Line 28 of service contains exactly: 'spawn-' . sha1($agentName . ':' . $amountUsd . ':' . gmdate('Y-m-d')). Uses $agentName (not trimmed) since validation already ensured non-empty.
